overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a steady walk from a dimly lit underground parking structure through a transition zone into a bright, sprawling futuristic metropolis. The clip showcases the dramatic contrast between gritty enclosed concrete spaces and the vibrant open cityscape with towering neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and elevated highway infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground concrete parking garage with graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dimly lit underground parking structure, approaching the distant exit

entered.detail: concrete underground facility with greenish ceiling and exposed beams
concrete walls covered in colorful spray paint and street art
thick support pillars with blue painted accents
red and white striped plastic construction barriers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit underground parking garage with graffiti-covered concrete walls and pillars. The camera moves forward through the enclosed space, passing under fluorescent lights and traffic barriers, with the exit visible as a small bright point in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: exit ramp transitioning from underground parking to street level

events.description: exiting the underground parking structure into the bright open city environment
dramatic shift from artificial fluorescent lighting to bright natural sunlight
futuristic armored truck passes by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: emerging from the underground garage into the bright sunlight while continuing to walk forward

notable_agents.action: futuristic armored truck driving past the camera from right to left

entered.detail: towering futuristic skyscrapers visible in the bright distance
large neon advertising screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the underground structure into a bright transitional space under an elevated highway. The scene shifts dramatically from dark artificial lighting to brilliant sunlight, revealing the futuristic city skyline ahead. A large armored truck passes by on the right as the camera continues moving forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic cyberpunk city street with towering skyscrapers and neon advertisements

events.description: camera pans upward to view the towering skyscrapers and elevated structures
futuristic sedan drives past on the road ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the city street while observing the towering architecture and neon signage, occasionally glancing up at the buildings

entered.detail: tall glass and steel towers with neon red and blue accents
floating holographic billboards and digital signage
steam rising from street-level ventilation grates
advanced cars driving along the multi-lane road

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals the full cyberpunk cityscape in bright daylight, with towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements rising on the left. The camera walks along a street beneath elevated highways, passing steam vents and futuristic vehicles. The architecture features a mix of ultra-modern glass towers and industrial infrastructure, creating a dense urban canyon effect.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gritty, dimly lit underground garage into the blinding brilliance of a sprawling futuristic metropolis. It begins by moving through an enclosed parking structure characterized by graffiti-covered concrete walls and flickering fluorescent lights, heading toward a distant point of light. As the camera exits the structure, the scene shifts dramatically from dark artificial tones to brilliant sunlight beneath the shadow of an elevated highway, where a large armored truck passes by. The environment then opens fully into a dense urban canyon of towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements under a clear sky. Finally, the camera advances along the street, passing steam vents and futuristic vehicles amidst a blend of ultra-modern glass towers and industrial infrastructure.
